raw_text: oscar alberto colan rabines q (+34) 686 96 16 00 oscaralberto.colan@hotmail.com urb. los pinos, olias del rey, toledo, spain mm oscar alberto colán rabines personal information driving license and own car. b2 level english certification, cambridge english qualifications. skills + familiarity with autocad, solidworks and abaqus, openfoam, c and matlab. experience working in teams and collaborating with colleagues to achieve project goals. e strong communication skills. agility with results. a recent aerospace engineering graduate with a strong academic foundation in aeronautical systems and a passion for innovation. i am highly motivated to gain in-depth professional experience and apply my theoretical knowledge to real-world challenges in aircraft systems integration education bachelor of science in aerospace engineering, university of castilla-la mancha, with a major in aerospace materials. september 2019 - july 2025 experience + intern at tsr wind, where my responsibilities included marking damages/defects on wind turbine blades. (december 15, 2023 - february 15, 2024) authored a technical book on navigation systems and automatic control, derived from my final degree thesis, with the aim of consolidating and disseminating advanced knowledge in aerospace engineering.
